creator: sjh13@po.cwru.edu
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?manpath=FreeBSD+4.4-RELEASE (I assume other values of manpath as well) contains the following sentence: 

 Or you can select a catagory from Quick Reference Categories and see man pages relevant to the selected topic.

The whole paragraph could probably use a rewrite, actually.

Fix: 

s/catagory/category/
